settings.title: Settings — My Notebook
settings.colortheme.desc: Sets the accent and a matching page color together.
settings.paper.lines: Faint rule lines on the page
settings.data.note: Back up to .zip saves a restorable copy (notes, images, and settings). Restore from backup replaces your current notebook with a .zip or a notebook_*.db snapshot; your current notes are saved to Backups first, then the app restarts. My Notebook also keeps the last 10 automatic snapshots in the Backups folder next to the app.
settings.behavior.closetray: Close button hides to the system tray
settings.behavior.pastesource: Keep source link when pasting from the web
settings.stats: {0} notes · {1} screenshot threads · {2} images · {3} in trash.
settings.ocr.ready: OCR engine ready, language: {0}. Text inside screenshots is searchable.
settings.ocr.none: No OCR language pack found. Install one in Windows Settings, Time & language, Language to make screenshot text searchable.
settings.langchange.title: Restart to change language
settings.langchange.msg: My Notebook needs to restart to switch the interface language. Restart now?
about.updates.title: Updates are manual
about.updates.msg: My Notebook does not update itself. To get new features and fixes, open the Releases page and install the latest version over your current one; your notes are never touched.
about.desc: A fast, private, local-first notebook for Windows 11: rich notes and OCR-searchable screenshot threads, with a Myanmar-aware search. No account, no cloud.
editor.placeholder: Start typing… (Ctrl+V to paste a screenshot)
